nasb.text: Now he went out and warred against the Philistines, and broke down the wall of Gath and the wall of Jabneh and the wall of Ashdod; and he built cities in the area of Ashdod and among the Philistines.

esv.text: He went out and made war against the Philistines and broke through the wall of Gath and the wall of Jabneh and the wall of Ashdod, and he built cities in the territory of Ashdod and elsewhere among the Philistines.

cnv.text: 他出去攻打非利士人，拆毀了迦特的城牆、雅比尼的城牆和亞實突的城牆；又在亞實突境內非利士人中，建造了幾座城。

ccb.text: 他出兵攻打非利士人，把迦特、雅比尼和亚实突的城墙夷平后，在亚实突境内及非利士人的其他地区兴建城邑。
